name_en: New small size with box YSL|||Saint Laurent suede mail bag, very unique, low-key and cool, really brings out the charm of a stylish, individual, and chic woman. It is the most popular Niki mail bag from YSL right now. Women who carry this bag are quite extraordinary, either celebrities, supermodels, or fashion trendsetters. In the past two years, the Niki mail bag has really gained a lot of fans with its distinctive style!
